BlogPage.schemaDescription: A blog index that curates technical writing and troubleshooting notes from Nangman Infra members.

AnnouncementsPage.schemaDescription: Operational notices and service updates from Nangman Infra.

IncidentsPage.schemaDescription: Public outage history and postmortem reports from production operations.
IncidentsPage.title: Incident Reports & Postmortems
IncidentsPage.subtitle: We document causes, technical evidence, and prevention steps for authentication and infrastructure incidents.

Terminal.welcome: Connected to Nangman Infra terminal v1.0.0
Terminal.commandNotFound: Command not found: {command}. Type 'help' for help.

ProfileModal.mentoringBody: Mentoring {count} junior members while sharing practical experience and technical knowledge.
ProfileModal.downloadDuration: This usually takes about 30 seconds to 1 minute.
ProfileModal.staleJobMessage: The previous portfolio PDF job expired, so a new one will be started.
ProfileModal.staleJobRetryMessage: The previous portfolio PDF job expired. Click the button again to create a new one.
ProfileModal.invalidResponse: The portfolio PDF job response format is invalid.
ProfileModal.missingJobId: The portfolio PDF job identifier was not returned.
ProfileModal.downloadFailed: Failed to download the portfolio PDF.
ProfileModal.jobFailed: Failed to generate the portfolio PDF.
ProfileModal.autoReady: The portfolio PDF is ready. Open the modal and click the button to download it.
ProfileModal.autoDownloading: The portfolio PDF is ready. Starting the download now.
ProfileModal.downloadStarted: The portfolio PDF download has started.
ProfileModal.manualRetryReady: The portfolio PDF is ready. Click the button to download it again.
ProfileModal.waitTooLong: The portfolio PDF generation is taking longer than expected. Please try again shortly.
ProfileModal.keepRunningHint: The job continues on the server even if you close this window.
ProfileModal.statusStarting: Starting the portfolio PDF generation job.
ProfileModal.progressPreparing: Preparing the job on the server.
ProfileModal.progressLongRunning: The document contains a lot of data, so the job needs a bit more time.
